plan_metadata.name: Sample SSO Enabled Tab via APIM Proxy Remote Debug

parameters.text: SSO Enabled Tab via APIM Proxy

steps.description: Type the text "SSO Enabled Tab via APIM Proxy" into the search input field labeled "🔍 APIM Proxy" within the "Samples" tab of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code.

Click the "Create" button in the Samples section of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code, located on a horizontal menu of sample filters and actions. And input ${{var:app_name:sso-tab-via-apim}} into the run time variable.
@code run script `npm install @azure/static-web-apps-cli --yes` in root folder `/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/sso-enabled-tab-via-apim-proxy`
Click the "Consent and log in" button in the Microsoft Teams web app SSO-enabled tab interface.
Click the "Accept" button on the Microsoft "Permissions requested" consent dialog to grant application permissions during Azure AD OAuth authentication.
Perform a right-click at coordinates (326, 191) on a blank area of the "auth-end.html" page within a browser, as marked by a red crosshair, with no visible interactive UI elements present.
Click the "View page source" option in the browser context menu on a Chrome web page, indicated by the red crosshair at (432, 490).
Click the "sso-tab-v..." tab in the Google Chrome browser to switch to the first tab in the "view-source" development interface.
Click the "OK" button on the error dialog stating "Login failed: Error: CancelledByUser" in the Microsoft Teams browser application interface.
Click the "Consent and log in" button in the SSO Enabled Tab via APIM proxy interface within Microsoft Teams web application.
@assertion  there is an item including "test" under "Current Login Account"
